reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark the typed adapter runner schema field list satisfied; keep runner honesty and eval selection claims separate.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names adapter schema fields, which are deterministic parser and validator behavior.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by focused adapter tests: typed runner metadata preserves id, surfaces, proof_class, command_template, smoke_command_template, assessment_path, and default_runtime, while invalid proof classes and surfaces are rejected.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep typed runner schema tests current when changing runner_readiness adapter fields.
